title: Reconciliation and verification
summary: 9706 — purpose of reconciliation, error detection, and internal controls.
learningObjectives: Explain why reconciliations verify accounting records.
Identify types of errors reconciliations detect.
Describe division of duties and authorisation.

simpleExplanation.title: Checking the books add up
simpleExplanation.summary: Reconciliation compares independent records to find errors — internal controls reduce fraud and mistakes before statements are prepared.
steps: Internal control — prevent and detect errors.

sections.content: **Reconciliation** (1.4.1) opens 1.4. Link to **bank rec** and **control accounts**.
